description_long: This is a modern, front-loading washing machine with a sleek, dark exterior and a large circular glass door framed in metallic trim. The control panel is located at the top front, featuring a digital display, several buttons, and a rotary dial for selecting wash cycles. The body is rectangular with smooth, flat sides and a slightly angled top edge, giving it a contemporary look. The door is transparent, allowing a partial view of the drum inside, and is likely made of reinforced glass or plastic. The machine appears robust and is designed to be freestanding, suitable for placement in laundry rooms, garages, or utility spaces. The overall finish is glossy, with minimal visible seams or external hardware aside from the control interface and door.
description: A sleek, dark front-loading washing machine with a large glass door and a modern control panel on the top front. The design is robust, glossy, and contemporary.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large circular glass door, metallic trim, and the full control panel with digital display, buttons, and rotary dial.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a plain, smooth, dark surface with the edge of the glass door slightly visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a featureless, flat, dark panel with no visible controls or openings.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with a plain, smooth surface and the edge of the glass door just visible.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is located at the top front of the machine, featuring a digital display, several buttons, and a single rotary dial. The layout is horizontal, with the display and buttons on the left and the dial on the right, accompanied by clear labeling.
attribute_door_type: Front-loading, circular door made of transparent glass or plastic with a metallic trim and an integrated handle.
attribute_brand_logo: A brand logo is visible on the upper left of the control panel, with the text 'CLOTHES' readable.
attribute_drum_visibility: Partially visible through the transparent door, showing the inner drum's outline and some internal features.
